$comment: BecomeChampion Rules Pack - Imperial Knights (10th Edition). Generated from 10e CSV data. Includes core Imperial Knights detachments and datasheets from the Imperial Knights faction pack and Forge World sources; not official rules text.
author: Community
source_note: Generated from current 10e CSV exports. This pack includes Imperial Knights detachments Questor Forgepact, Valourstrike Lance, Gate Warden Lance, Questoris Companions, Spearhead-At-Arms plus standard Core Stratagems. Rules text is extracted and normalized for in-app prompting; check official publications for authoritative wording.

abilities.name: Sunderer of Fortresses
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a VEHICLE , improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that at
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a VEHICLE , improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a FORTIFICATION , improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead.

abilities.name: Conversion
abilities.timing: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 24" from the bearer, an unmodified successful H
abilities.summary: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 24" from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Bastion of Firepower
abilities.timing: Each time this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [LETH
abilities.summary: Each time this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Suppression Protocols
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Armiger autocannon
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Armiger autocannon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Protection Protocols
abilities.timing: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted
abilities.summary: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Conversion
abilities.timing: Each time an attack made with this weapon targets a unit more than 12" from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit rol
abilities.summary: Each time an attack made with this weapon targets a unit more than 12" from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Impetuous Glory
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s reaper chain-cleaver - strike profile, and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s reaper chain-cleaver - sweep profile.

abilities.name: Legendary Freeblade
abilities.timing: Once per turn, when you target this model with a stratagem, you may reduce the CP cost of that use of that stratagem by
abilities.summary: Once per turn, when you target this model with a stratagem, you may reduce the CP cost of that use of that stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Chainbreaker
abilities.timing: Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model
abilities.summary: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly IMPERIUM unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Acheron’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result when they do
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, at the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result when they do.

abilities.name: Searing Flames
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Acheron flame cannon
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Acheron flame cannon. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Atrapos’ Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes an attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING model
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes an attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING model, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Macro-extinction Protocols
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is TI
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is TITANIC or TOWERING , add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Castigator’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, its ranged weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability and the Armour Penetra
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, its ranged weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability and the Armour Penetration characteristic of its ranged weapons is improved by 1.

abilities.name: Storm of Bolts
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) hit by one or more of those attacks
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this model is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Lancer’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Shock Charge
abilities.timing: You can target this model with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a diffe
abilities.summary: You can target this model with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Ion Aegis (Aura)
abilities.timing: While a friendly Armiger model is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that model, it has the Bene
abilities.summary: While a friendly Armiger model is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that model, it has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Titan Hunter
abilities.timing: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a MONSTER or VEHICLE model, you can re-roll the Damage roll
abilities.summary: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a MONSTER or VEHICLE model, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.name: Crusader’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Punishing Salvoes
abilities.timing: In your Movement phase, if this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability
abilities.summary: In your Movement phase, if this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Defender’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, each time an attack is allocated to that model, subtract 1 from the Damage ch
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, each time an attack is allocated to that model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Selfless Protector
abilities.timing: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an Imperial Knights model from your army, if that model is not fully visible t
abilities.summary: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an Imperial Knights model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Knight Defender model, that model has the Benefit of Cover and a 4+ invulnerable save against that attack.

abilities.name: Conversion
abilities.timing: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 18" away from the bearer, an unmodified success
abilities.summary: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 18" away from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Errant’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that model and ranged weapons equipped
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that model and ranged weapons equipped by that model have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abilities.name: Aggressive Assault
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Hit roll.
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Gallant’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that model and each time that model mak
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that model and each time that model makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Martial Pride
abilities.timing: Each time this unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" provided your unit can end that move within Eng
abilities.summary: Each time this unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" provided your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

abilities.name: Paladin’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, weapons equipped by that model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability, and melee weap
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, weapons equipped by that model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability, and melee weapons equipped by that model have the [LANCE] ability.

abilities.name: Seasoned Noble
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration char
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Mentor (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: Each time a model affected by this ability makes an attack that targets this model’s quarry, you can re-roll the Wound r
abilities.summary: Each time a model affected by this ability makes an attack that targets this model’s quarry, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Code
abilities.timing: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this model’s quarry. Each time this model ma
abilities.summary: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this model’s quarry. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s quarry is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its quarry.

abilities.name: Ion Aegis (Aura)
abilities.timing: While a friendly Armiger model is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that model, it has the Bene
abilities.summary: While a friendly Armiger model is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that model, it has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Thundershock
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model’s thundercoil harpoon, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for each other enemy unit within 6" of the target unit
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model’s thundercoil harpoon, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for each other enemy unit within 6" of the target unit. On a 4+, the unit being rolled for is struck by arcing energies; after resolving all of this model’s attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by arcing energies suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Warden’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, weapons equipped by that model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and range
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, weapons equipped by that model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and ranged weapons equipped by that model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Thin Their Ranks
abilities.timing: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ), that attack ha
abilities.summary: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ), that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Magaera’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Repair Auto-simulacra
abilities.timing: At the end of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds
abilities.summary: At the end of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Styrix’s Duty (Bondsman)
abilities.timing: Battle-shock test, subtracting one from the test when doing so
abilities.summary: While a model is affected by this ability, each time that model is selected to shoot or fight, after it has resolved all of its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting one from the test when doing so.

abilities.name: Grav-pinned
abilities.timing: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if an enemy INFANTRY unit was hit by one or more of those attacks made with a graviton crusher, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is grav-pinned
abilities.summary: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if an enemy INFANTRY unit was hit by one or more of those attacks made with a graviton crusher, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is grav-pinned. While a unit is grav-pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

stratagems.name: GO TO GROUND
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have a 6+ invulnerable save and have the Benefit of Cover.

stratagems.name: COMMAND RE-ROLL
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after you make an Advance roll, a Charge roll, a Desperate Escape test or a Hazardous test for a unit from your army, or a Hit roll, a Wound roll, a Damage roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, or a roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in that unit. If you are using fast dice rolling, this Stratagem can still be used after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.
stratagems.target: That unit or model from your army.
stratagems.effect: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those rolls or saving throws to re-roll.

stratagems.name: EPIC CHALLENGE
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, when a CHARACTER unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more Attached units is selected to fight.
stratagems.target: One CHARACTER model in your unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all melee attacks made by that model have the [PRECISION] ability.

stratagems.name: INSANE BRAVERY
stratagems.timing: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just before you take a Battle-shock test for a unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit automatically passes that Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: HEROIC INTERVENTION
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.

stratagems.name: FIRE OVERWATCH
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit starts or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, or declares a charge.
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 24" of that enemy unit and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase.
stratagems.effect: If that enemy unit is visible to your unit, your unit can shoot that enemy unit as if it were your Shooting phase.

stratagems.name: RAPID INGRESS
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, and if every model in that unit has the Deep Strike ability, you can set that unit up as described in the Deep Strike ability (even though it is not your Movement phase).

stratagems.name: COUNTER-OFFENSIVE
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has fought.
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit fights next.

stratagems.name: TANK SHOCK
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase, just after a VEHICLE unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: That VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, and select one VEHICLE model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Roll a number of D6 equal to the Toughness characteristic of the selected VEHICLE model. For each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

stratagems.name: SMOKESCREEN
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SMOKE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability.

stratagems.name: GRENADE
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One GRENADES unit from your army (excluding units that Advanced, Fell Back or have shot this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one GRENADES model in your unit and one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your GRENADES model. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

stratagems.name: MARSHAL THE DEFENCE
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: Up to two Imperial Knights units from your army that have not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in your units.
tags: Gate Warden Lance – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: TITANIC BOMBARDMENT
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights Titanic unit from your army that Remained Stationary this turn, that is on your defensive line and that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability.
tags: Gate Warden Lance – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: STEADFAST SUPERIORITY
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that is on your defensive line and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
tags: Gate Warden Lance – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: DRIVE THEM OUT!
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit on your defensive line, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
tags: Gate Warden Lance – Battle Tactic Stratagem

stratagems.name: FORTRESS OF INTIMIDATION
stratagems.timing: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights Titanic unit from your army that is on your defensive line.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, that unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.
tags: Gate Warden Lance – Epic Deed Stratagem

stratagems.name: LANCEBREAKER
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is on your defensive line.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greaterthan the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll
tags: Gate Warden Lance – Strategic Ploy Stratagem

stratagems.name: BONDED IMPERATIVE
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase, just before an Imperial Knights Character unit from your army uses a Bondsman ability.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.effect: When selecting targets for that use of that Bondsman ability, you can select one friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit within 12" of your unit in addition, or instead of selecting one Armiger model. Until the start of your next Command phase, every model in that ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit is affected by that Bondsman ability.

stratagems.name: AGGRESSION BEGETS AGGRESSION
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army or one Imperial Knights Character unit from your army and one friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit that is within 6" of that unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your units have the [ASSAULT] ability.

stratagems.name: OMNISSIAH’S GRACE
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an Imperial Knights or Adeptus Mechanicus unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS or ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: MACHINE FOCUS
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any Hit roll or Wound roll made for it.

stratagems.name: VENGEANCE OF THE MACHINE CULT
stratagems.timing: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, the enemy unit that destroyed your unit is Marked. Each time an Adeptus Mechanicus model from your army makes an attack that targets a Marked unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: THRONEGHEIST FURY
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights Titanic unit from your army that is within 24" of and visible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one ranged weapon equipped by a model in your unit. That model can shoot at that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target). When doing so, that model can only make attacks with that weapon and each time it makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit, irrespective of the attacking weapon’s Ballistic Skill or any modifiers.

stratagems.name: MOMENT OF GLORY
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just before an Imperial Knights Titanic unit from your army Consolidates.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" provided your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

stratagems.name: TITANIC DUEL
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights Titanic model from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER , TITANIC or WALKER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: DRIVEN BY THE PAST
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights Titanic unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

stratagems.name: COURAGEOUS STAND
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights Titanic unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

stratagems.name: UNSTOPPABLE WARRIOR
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after an Imperial Knights Titanic unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: HERO’S TREAD
stratagems.timing: End of your Command phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights Titanic model from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: Your Level of Control over that objective marker is 5 (unless it would otherwise be higher), until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

stratagems.name: VIRTUE OF COURAGE
stratagems.timing: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Armiger model from your army, or one Imperial Knights Titanic model from your army, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time one of your ARMIGER models makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: THIN THEIR RANKS
stratagems.timing: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Armiger model from your army, or one Imperial Knights Titanic model from your army, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by your ARMIGER models have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability.

stratagems.name: EXEMPLAR’S WISDOM
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase, just after an Imperial Knights Titanic model from your army has shot.
stratagems.target: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS TITANIC model, and one or more friendly Armiger models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time one of your ARMIGER models makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: LET DUTY BE YOUR SHIELD
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Armiger unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking units attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: MANTLE OF THE MENTOR
stratagems.timing: Start of your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Armiger model from your army, or one Imperial Knights Titanic model from your army, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your ARMIGER models are eligible to shoot in a turn in which they Fell Back.

stratagems.name: SQUIRES OFTHE HUNT
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Armiger model from your army, or one Imperial Knights Titanic model from your army, and one or more friendly ARMIGER models affected by that model’s Bondsman ability.
stratagems.effect: For each of your ARMIGER models that is within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove that ARMIGER model from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: FULL TILT
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of your models and add 2 to Advance rolls made for those model’s units.

stratagems.name: THUNDERSTOMP
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights model from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, the Attacks characteristic of any armoured Feet melee weapons equipped by your model is 8, the Attacks characteristic of any titanic Feet melee weapons equipped by your model is 12, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: RUN THEM THROUGH!
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by your models have the [LANCE] ability.

stratagems.name: VOW OF RETRIBUTION
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by your models have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

stratagems.name: TACTICAL FOIL
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights model from your army that is within 9" of that unit.
stratagems.effect: Your model can make a Normal move of up to D6".

stratagems.name: ROTATE ION SHIELDS
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Imperial Knights unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

detachment_rules.name: Cogbound Alliance
detachment_rules.summary:
Imperial Knights units from your army have the following the ability:
Sacristan Pledge: In your Command phase, one model in this unit regains 1 lost wound. If this unit is within 3" of one or more friendly Tech-Priest models, one model in this unit regains up to D3 lost wounds instead.
Adeptus Mechanicus units from your army have the following ability:
Divine Inspiration: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly IMPERIAL KNIGHTS units, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.
FORGE WORLD ALLIES
You can include the following ADEPTUS MECHANICUS units in your army: Tech-Priest Dominus; Tech-Priest Manipulus; Skitarii Marshal; Skitarii Rangers; Skitarii Vanguard. The combined points cost of such units depends on your battle size:
- Incursion: Up to 250 pts
- Strike Force: Up to 500 pts
- Onslaught: Up to 750 pts
No ADEPTUS MECHANICUS models from your army can be your WARLORD .

detachment_rules.name: Bold Gallantry
detachment_rules.summary: Each time an Imperial Knights unit from your army Advances, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by IMPERIAL KNIGHTS models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.

detachment_rules.name: Dauntless Defenders
detachment_rules.summary:
At the start of the first battle round, select two objective markers on the battlefield to be your foundations. When you draw a line from any part of one of your foundations to the other, if any part of a model’s base (or any part of a model’s hull, for a model without a base) crosses that line, that model’s unit is said to be on your defensive line.
While an Imperial Knights unit from your army is on your defensive line, that unit has the following ability:
Against the Horde: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll, and weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [sustained hits 1] ability.
Each time one of your foundations is removed from the battlefield (e.g. by a Primary Mission rule), just after it is removed, select a new objective marker on the battlefield to be one of your foundations.

detachment_rules.name: Heroes of Legend
detachment_rules.summary:
At the start of your turn, if your current Oath is fulfilled, determine an additional Oath as described here, with the exception that you cannot select a Deed or Quality you have already selected (if you are randomly selecting the Deed and/or Quality and roll any result that you have already selected, select a Deed or Quality you have not already selected instead). If you cannot determine an additional Oath because you have already selected each Deed and each Quality, do not determine an additional Oath.
The Qualities from Oaths you have fulfilled continue to apply to all models in your army with the Code Chivalric ability. When the Deed for an additional Oath is completed, you instead gain 1CP, regardless of how you selected the Deed or Quality.

detachment_rules.name: Valour’s Reward
detachment_rules.summary: The Enhancements shown below can become expended. You cannot use such Enhancements while they are expended. Each time you fulfil your Oath, each expended Enhancement is no longer expended.

detachment_rules.name: Knightly Teachings
detachment_rules.summary:
Each time a model from your army uses its Bondsman ability, if no other model from your army has used that Bondsman ability that turn, you can select up to three friendly Armiger models (instead of one) within 12" of that model, or within 15" of that model while your army is Honoured (you still cannot select a model that is already being affected by a Bondsman ability). Until the start of your next Command phase, those models are affected by that Bondsman ability.
KEYWORDS
ARMIGER models from your army gain the BATTLELINE keyword.

enhancements.name: Herald of Triumph
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. When the bearer ends a Charge move, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Mentor’s Pride
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While two or more Armiger models are under the effects of the bearers Bondsman ability, each time each of those ARMIGER models makes an attack, you can re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Iron Chalice
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. At the end of your Movement phase, select one other IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That selected model regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds if your army is Honoured.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Omnissian Champion
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Add 4 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

Points: 30

enhancements.name: Acquisitor-at-Arms
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While the bearer is on your defensive line and there are no enemy units on your defensive line, add the bearers Objective Control characteristic to that of each model affected by the bearers Bondsman ability.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Knight of the Opus Machina
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, if the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus units, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Wyrmslayer Divination
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. In your Shooting phase, when the bearer is selected to shoot, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then until the end of the phase, each time it makes an attack that targets a unit that can FLY , you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Evanescent Ion
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. At the end of your Movement phase, select one other IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that selected model has the Stealth ability.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Fables of Nightmare
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While two or more Armiger models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, melee weapons equipped by those ARMIGER models have the [precision] ability.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Purgation’s Hand
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is on your defensive line, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Tales of Heroism
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While two or more Armiger models are under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, each time one of those ARMIGER models makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and/or the Wound roll.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Pennant of Silvered Fury
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. When the bearer is selected to fight, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [sustained hits 2] ability.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Magos Questoris
enhancements.summary:
Tech-Priest model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly Imperial Knights units, it has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, select one friendly Imperial Knights model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to 2 lost wounds.

Points: 35

enhancements.name: Augury Halo
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, while the bearer is on your defensive line, weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ignores cover] ability.

Points: 20

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Judicant’s Helm
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one other IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by that selected model have the [ignores cover] ability.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Martial Tuition
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While two or more Armiger models arc under the effects of the bearer’s Bondsman ability, once per turn, you can target one of those ARMIGER models with the Counter-offensive Stratagem for 0CP.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Bearer of the Lancer’s Sigil
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. At the start of your Charge phase, select one other IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model from your army that is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that selected model.

Points: 25

enhancements.name: Crushing Condemnation
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. When the bearer is selected to fight, after resolving its attacks, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, this Enhancement is expended, then select one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Points: 10

enhancements.name: Vengeful Tread
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. Once per turn, you can target the bearer with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP.

Points: 15

enhancements.name: Vocifer Magnificat (Aura)
enhancements.summary:
IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. While a friendly Adeptus Mechanicus unit is within 6" of the bearer, improve the Leadership characteristic of 1 models in that ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit by 1.

Points: 15
